description_long: This house is a modern, low-rise residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring multiple water features, green lawns, and shaded seating areas. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes with flat roofs, large glass windows, and blue-tinted canopies. The central section is flanked by symmetrical garden spaces, fountains, and paved walkways, creating a balanced and inviting layout. Outdoor amenities include gazebos, benches, and a variety of trees and shrubs, enhancing the sense of luxury and relaxation. The main entrance is accentuated by a wide staircase and a prominent overhang, leading to a spacious front patio. The overall design emphasizes open space, symmetry, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, blue canopies, and landscaped gardens featuring fountains and shaded seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, central water feature, and symmetrical garden layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue canopies, outdoor seating areas, and the arrangement of trees and gazebos.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional water features, and the overall symmetry of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the secondary entrance, more greenery, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Wide central staircase, prominent overhang, glass doors, and landscaped approach with fountains
